northStar: AI operating system for a rental fleet business, focused on recommendations not just dashboards.
dailyQuestions: What vehicle should I buy next?
Where is demand increasing or falling?
Which competitors are outperforming me, and why?
What actions will make me the most money today?

engines.name: Market Observation Engine
engines.goal: Collect permitted market observations for listings, prices, ratings, trips, delivery options, and supply changes.
nextMilestones: Store every observation historically instead of only latest snapshot.
Track new and removed competitor listings.
Add source confidence and source age scoring.

engines.name: Calendar Intelligence Engine
engines.goal: Infer competitor utilization from recurring visible availability snapshots where permitted.
nextMilestones: Merge utilization into intelligence-report.json and dashboards.
guardrails: Unknown-heavy snapshots must be low confidence.

engines.name: Pricing Intelligence Engine
engines.goal: Recommend weekday, weekend, event, and last-minute pricing using market, utilization, event, and cost data.
nextMilestones: Add price change tracking over time.

engines.name: Demand Forecasting Engine
engines.goal: Predict demand using events, seasonality, historical utilization, supply, and booking lead time.

engines.name: Fleet Acquisition Engine
engines.goal: Rank what vehicle to buy next by expected ROI, utilization, payback, risk, competition, and market shortage.

engines.name: Competitor Intelligence Engine
engines.goal: Track competitor hosts, price changes, listing changes, utilization patterns, and review/trip velocity.

engines.name: Geographic Intelligence Engine
engines.goal: Compare demand and pricing by Las Vegas submarket instead of treating the whole city as one market.
nextMilestones: Support LAS airport, Strip, Downtown, Henderson, Summerlin, North Las Vegas.

engines.name: Operations Intelligence Engine
engines.goal: Turn market and fleet data into daily action items.
nextMilestones: Prioritize actions by expected profit impact.

engines.name: Executive AI
engines.goal: Generate daily plain-English fleet briefings with recommendations and reasoning.
nextMilestones: Add concise briefing section to dashboard.
Add confidence and evidence to recommendations.

definitionOfDone: The app answers what to charge today.
The app ranks what vehicle to buy next.
The app identifies demand increases and decreases.
The app identifies which competitors are winning and why.
The app gives a prioritized daily action list.
The app rejects stale, missing, or low-confidence data instead of pretending to know.
The app stores historical observations instead of overwriting them.
